reason: Response B shows tighter craft and more purposeful concrete detail (the 1987 storm-shutter sign, the elm trees as ribs) plus a recurring "driving away" motif that pays off cleanly in the final line, which is characteristic of the stronger mid-tier model. Response A is competent but relies on more conventional gothic atmosphere and a telegraphed italicized-note twist that reads as the smaller model's instinct toward overt dramatic gestures. The structural restraint and rhythmic control in B point to Sonnet.
